rows.notes: Top-centre page title. Handwriting a little stylised; read as 'Levyy Rines' (could be 'Levy Rines' or similar). No amounts in the same line.

Small cluster of place/names at very top-left with a single small 3 | 14 | 4 aligned in the pounds/shillings/pence columns at the top-right. rows.notes: A long line of text has been heavily struck through. I transcribed as 'Recepcheck ...' to reflect visible letter shapes, but the line is mostly illegible due to the strike-through. No amounts visible on this line.

rows.notes: Subtotal aligned with the bracketed list; numeric columns read clearly as 4 | 10 | 0. There is no descriptive text on the same line (appears as a lone amount), so treated as a subtotal/total for the bracket.
Section sum clearly written 'Sum' with amounts 23 | 14 | 3. Matches column alignment and validates against the component amounts (15 9 11 + 4 10 0 + 3 14 4 = 23 14 3).
Centered heading for the next account section. Handwriting clear ('Dno Xri et Socijs'). No amounts on this line.

rows.notes: Section total clearly written as 183 | 2 | 0. Numeric alignment with previous lines is consistent; values are within expected ranges.
Major total line. 'Summa Omnium Solutionum' is clearly written; amounts 533 | 9 | 6 are aligned in the three money columns and easily legible.

Reads as 'Summa Omnium Receptorum' (orthography uncertain). The numeric block reads '455 | 6 | 7' though there is some small, faint stray ink to the right of the pence that slightly obscures final digit; chosen reading is 7d based on shape and spacing.
Clear 'Ita debentur Dno Computanti' with amounts 78 | 2 | 10. Alignment and numerals are legible and consistent with the ledger columns.
Signature/name line beneath totals. Handwriting clear and no amount on the line.
Second signature/name line; 'dec.' abbreviation visible. No monetary amount.
Third signature/name line; fairly clear handwriting. No amount on this line.

Bottom-right contains several inked signatures; this particular flourish reads roughly as 'Gri. Paynter' but is heavily stylised/partly overwritten; no amount. Low confidence due to cursive overlap and ink blotting.
Several further small signature-like scribbles at the very bottom-right are present; mostly illegible and overlapped. No monetary amounts associated. Recorded as a single row of illegible signatures.
